summary: Story Preview Feature Testing Complete - All Tests Passed. Backend: 7/7 tests passed for GET and POST /api/brand-portal/story-preview endpoints. Frontend: Story Preview Card displays correctly on Dashboard with Generate/Regenerate button, loading state, highlighted brand name, timestamp, and AI-generated story content.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/brand-portal/story-preview correctly returns cached preview text and generated_at timestamp
POST /api/brand-portal/story-preview correctly generates new AI story and caches it in DB
400 error returned when brand has no problem_statement or products (validation working)
Both endpoints require brand_partner authentication (403 for unauthenticated)
Frontend StoryPreviewCard correctly shows conditional rendering based on brand data
Brand name highlighting uses amber background (.bg-amber-200) as specified
Regenerate button shows after preview is cached, Generate Preview shows initially
Loading state displays spinner and 'AI is crafting your story preview...' message
Timestamp formatted correctly with date and time
seed_data_creation: Brand testbrand@test.com has cached story_preview and story_preview_generated_at in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Preview feature fully functional. Brand partner 'testbrand@test.com' has problem_statement='We help children learn to read through interactive stories' and a cached story preview. Frontend correctly displays Story Preview Card on Dashboard when brand has problem_statement or products. AI generation uses Emergent LLM Key (real, not mocked).
